stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct as regards fog, mist or haze?

options.a: Fog is water that has condensed close to ground level, producing a cloud of very small droplets that reduces visibility to less than 1 km.
options.b: Mist consists of fine dust or salt particles in the air that reduce visibility to a lesser extent than fog.
options.c: Haze is made up of fine ice crystals suspended in the atmosphere that reduce visibility to between 1 km and 5 km.
options.d: Haze is a dense suspension in the air of small particles produced by burning that reduces visibility to less than 1 km.
